title: AI network monitoring tool evaluation: Datadog AI vs New Relic vs Splunk remote operation and maintenance comparison - 2026 Review
description: Evaluate the anomaly detection and intelligent alarm functions of AI operation and maintenance tools such as Datadog AI, New Relic AI, and Splunk to help you find the most suitable infrastructure monitoring solution for your remote operation and maintenance team.
content: \u003ch2\u003eRemote operation and maintenance monitoring challenges\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eThe remote operation and maintenance team has no method to check the server status on-site, which requires AI to automatically detect anomalies, intelligent alarms, and predict failures. AI operation and maintenance tools (AIOps) can significantly reduce operation and maintenance pressure.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003eCore Features comparison\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003efunction\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eDatadog AI\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eNew
author: DevOps Technology Analyst
